summary_sections.title: Overview
summary_sections.content_html: Faraday's Law and Lenz's Law is a key topic in Magnetism for AP Physics 2.

summary_sections.title: Key Concepts
summary_sections.content_html: This lesson covers the fundamental principles of faraday's law and lenz's law.

summary_sections.title: Applications
summary_sections.content_html: Understanding faraday's law and lenz's law has applications in various areas of physics and engineering.
